name: Scary Teacher 3D
author: Poki
description: Scary Teacher 3D is a puzzle game where it's time to turn the tables on the Scary Teacher! Sneak into her house, complete mischievous missions, and give her a taste of her own medicine—all without getting caught! Explore an interactive open-world home, solve mysteries in different rooms, and pull off the perfect pranks before time runs out. Are you ready to outsmart the Scary Teacher? How to play Scary Teacher 3D? Walk: WASD or the arrow keys Camera: Use your mouse to adjust camera angle Take action: E Who created Scary Teacher 3D? Scary Teacher 3D is created by ZnK Games. Play their other games on Poki: Pull the String , Prankster 3D , Hide and Seek and School Escape! ! How can I play Scary Teacher 3D for free? You can play Scary Teacher 3D for free on Poki. Can I play Scary Teacher 3D on mobile devices and desktop? Scary Teacher 3D can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
